name: Start
long_description: Begin with Asciende Hub — Start, which includes everything related to your personal development: training plan, nutrition plan, habit tracking, goal setting, anamnesis, anthropometry profile, and your right to support athletes you believe in.
long_description_es: Comienza con Asciende Hub — Inicia, que incluye todo lo relacionado con tu desarrollo personal: plan de entrenamiento, plan de nutrición, seguimiento de hábitos, establecimiento de objetivos, anamnesis, perfil antropométrico y tu derecho a apoyar a los atletas en los que crees.
long_description_en: Begin with Asciende Hub — Start, which includes everything related to your personal development: training plan, nutrition plan, habit tracking, goal setting, anamnesis, anthropometry profile, and your right to support athletes you believe in.

name: Asciende
long_description: Upgrade to Asciende and unlock access to brand support, athlete marketplace offers, partner discounts, and learning communities through Teams & Sports. You will also receive discounts on courses in BASE, our education platform.
description_es: Desbloquea apoyo de marcas y comunidad
long_description_es: Actualiza a Asciende y desbloquea acceso a apoyo de marcas, ofertas del marketplace de atletas, descuentos de socios y comunidades de aprendizaje a través de Teams & Sports. También recibirás descuentos en cursos en BASE, nuestra plataforma educativa.
long_description_en: Upgrade to Asciende and unlock access to brand support, athlete marketplace offers, partner discounts, and learning communities through Teams & Sports. You will also receive discounts on courses in BASE, our education platform.

name: PRO
long_description: PRO includes everything from Asciende — plus a sport-specific, level-adapted monthly gym plan and professional coach supervision to guide your progression safely and efficiently. Includes 1 monthly 1-on-1 video call and continuous chat support.
description_es: Entrenamiento profesional y específico por deporte
long_description_es: PRO incluye todo de Asciende — más un plan mensual de gimnasio específico por deporte y adaptado por nivel, y supervisión profesional de un coach para guiar tu progresión de forma segura y eficiente. Incluye 1 videollamada 1-on-1 mensual y soporte continuo por chat.
long_description_en: PRO includes everything from Asciende — plus a sport-specific, level-adapted monthly gym plan and professional coach supervision to guide your progression safely and efficiently. Includes 1 monthly 1-on-1 video call and continuous chat support.
features_es: Plan mensual por deporte y nivel
